compiled_state.title: Write RED test for brainstorm convert-to-epic path
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh with 5 tests:

1. test_convert_section_exists — SKILL.md contains a dedicated Convert-to-Epic Path section
2. test_convert_closes_original_after_epic_created — Section instructs closing original ONLY after new epic is successfully created (position check: close step after create/Phase 1 step)
3. test_convert_references_original_ticket — Section instructs including the original ticket ID in the new epic description for traceability
4. test_convert_handles_edge_cases — Section addresses bug ticket --reason flag requirement and tickets with open children
5. test_convert_gate_delegates_not_inline — The Type Detection Gate's Option (a) references the Convert-to-Epic Path section rather than containing its own inline close command

Test approach: Structural/metadata validation of skill instruction file. Follow convention: echo "=== test_name ===" markers, SECTION, pass()/fail(), extract_section(). For test 2, use python3 position check (close step line number > create step line number). For test 5, verify the gate's Option (a) section does NOT contain 'ticket transition' inline.

Add .test-index entry with RED marker: append ,tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh [test_convert_section_exists] to the brainstorm SKILL.md line.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 5 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'echo "=== test_' tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Running the test returns non-zero exit (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh \[test_convert_section_exists\]' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh (created), .test-index (modified). Tests: 0 passed, 6 failed (expected RED state).
